summary: Classified all five hydrated open PRs independently. This inventory shard has no shared canonical, no security-sensitive items, and no safe close/merge/fix action allowed by the job; each PR should remain open for its normal maintainer or author workflow.

actions.reason: Open focused maintainer-owned memory timeout PR with its own linked issue and author workflow; not a duplicate, low-signal, superseded, or closure candidate in this shard.
Open maintainer-owned plugin npm-root fix with requested maintainer review and a distinct linked issue; keep it outside this cleanup shard.
Small contributor bug-fix PR with useful code and active author workflow; closure would not preserve contributor work and there is no hydrated replacement candidate.
Open contributor UI fix with nontrivial discussion count and a distinct linked issue; keep it for normal maintainer review rather than closing or merging from this plan-only inventory shard.
Open maintainer-owned Codex validation PR with unresolved automated review-comment signal; it is not low-signal or superseded, and merge/fix actions are blocked for this job.
